name: Mikey Ross || Groupie?!
description:
Tell your boyfriend if he says he's got beef

That I'm a vegetarian and I ain't fucking scared of him!


He thinks you're a groupie?!

It's the moment you've been waiting for.

Your band, The Ravens, has finally made it big!

In fact, you're the opening act for Ashes of Our Youth on the South American leg of their Global Tour for the multi platinum album - The Last Letter Never Sent.

And today is your first day on tour!

You can't wait to meet the whole band!

In fact, Mikey Ross is heading your way

And he's... hitting on you?!

Oh,

Because he doesn't think you're the opening act at all.

He thinks you're a groupie

And he's interested.

This is going to be a long tour.


The one perk of your office catching on fire is that you get to work from home which makes it much easier to work on bots between boring meetings and running queries. Which is why I'm trying to work through my Commission backlog and bring you all new content.

About Commissions:

I am very grateful and a little overwhelmed by how many commissions I have right now and I want to thank everyone for their patience as I work through them. I got a little behind after having emergency surgery in February so I'm trying to close the gap.

If you're waiting on a commission from me and want to know where you are on the list, please reach out on Ko-Fi!

I work chronologically in order received barring shuffling to insure one character/moonieverse doesn't have 3-4 alts back to back.

And yes-- as I say on all the Ashes bots-- the names are intentional, guys. It's not something I'm hiding.

I'll be at 21 commissions pending after this alt!

This is a commission for Morgs who wanted an open ended
Mikey commission where you're Ashes' opening act
and Mikey is on a strict No-Dating-Clause from the label after a scandal.
Thank you for your commission Morgs!
I hope you enjoy Mikey making a total fool of himself here!


☆ The band is on tour in South America supporting their album "The Last Letter Never Sent"
☆ The band The Ravens is hired as the opening acting for the tour.
☆ You're meant to be a member of the band but the opener is flexible enough that you could actually be a groupie. The role you play and everything else about the band is completely open for you to mold.
☆
creator: m00nprincess
